title: Manager, Community Engagement
description:
The Manager, Community Engagement leads the strategic and operational aspects of community engagement, public relations, fundraising, donor stewardship, volunteer management, and event planning. This role plays a key part in elevating the charity’s visibility, strengthening stakeholder relationships, and driving resources to advance its mission.


JOIN US if you are a passionate, service-oriented leader dedicated to upholding the values of our profession and organisation.


Key Responsibilities:


🤝Community Engagement & Donor Relations

· Build and nurture relationships with donors, partners, foundations and family offices.

· Develop strategies to grow our donor base and enhance retention.

· Manage donor accounts and ensure thoughtful stewardship.

· Optimize CRM systems for targeted outreach and data-driven insights.


💰Fundraising & Resource Mobilization

· Lead fundraising campaigns across digital, direct mail, grants, and sponsorships.

· Organize impactful fundraising events aligned with our mission.

· Prepare annual fundraising plans and performance reports.

· Cultivate partnerships to boost visibility and community support.


📣PR & Communications

· Oversee marketing and communications across all platforms.

· Manage media relations and public messaging to elevate our brand.

· Ensure consistent and compelling messaging for all stakeholders.

· Coordinate internal communications to keep staff informed and engaged.


🎉Event Planning & Stakeholder Engagement

· Plan and execute donor appreciation events and community outreach programmes and activities.

· Collaborate across teams to deliver seamless and strategic events.

· Gather feedback and measure event success to inform future initiatives.


🙌Volunteer Management

· Supervise the team in developing sustainable volunteer engagement strategies.

· Strengthen relationships with new and existing volunteers.

· Integrate volunteer and donor systems for better coordination.

· Oversee centralized databases for recognition and engagement.


👥Team Leadership & Collaboration

· Mentor and support team members to foster a high-performance culture.

· Set clear goals, conduct reviews, and encourage professional growth.

· Promote collaboration across fundraising, engagement, and volunteer functions


Requirements

· Degree in Marketing, Mass Communications, Public Relations, or related field.

· Minimum 5–7 years of relevant experience in community engagement, fundraising, PR/comms, event planning, and volunteer management.

· Strong leadership, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills.

· Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

· Proficient in digital tools such as CRM systems, and social media platforms.

· Adaptable, resourceful, and mission-driven.

postedCompany.description:
REACH Community Services Ltd. is a charitable organisation established in 1999 which seeks to inspire hope and empower positive change in vulnerable families, couples, youths and lonely seniors through our 10 community touchpoints: Family Service Centre @ Bishan, Family Service Centre @ Sin Ming, Youth Powerhouse @ Bukit Batok, Counselling Centre @ Shunfu, Senior Centre @Jalan Membina, Senior Centre @ Bukit Batok, Senior Centre @ Bukit Gombak Vista, Active Ageing Centre (Care) @ Teck Whye Vista and Senior Care Centre @ Senja Valley.


• Good career development opportunities

• Great learning opportunities

• Warm and friendly environment
postedCompany.name: REACH COMMUNITY SERVICES LTD.
